hero.title: we optimize IT for you
hero.description: With technology continuing to grow and play a bigger role than ever in our lives, so do the complexities and costs of managing it. Artha Mitra Interdata is built to partner with you in managing IT infrastructure and security by optimizing its efficiency.

howItWorks.title: How We Optimize IT For You
howItWorks.description: Our core focus has never wavered since our establishment in that we have always trusted in the partnership approach of shared responsibility and vision. This is how we differ from other IT Solutions Integrator and Provider, we hold ourselves accountable to what we set out to achieve.

tabs.label: Solutions

items.name: Network Hardware
items.description: Enterprise-grade architectural foundations built for resilient scalability.

items.name: Firewall
items.description: Intelligent security perimeters that adapt to evolving threat landscapes.

items.name: SD-WAN

items.name: Application Security
items.description: Protecting software from vulnerabilities and attacks throughout its lifecycle.

items.name: Security Management
items.description: Planning, implementing, and maintaining security policies and controls.

items.name: Incident Management
items.description: Identifying, responding to, and resolving security incidents quickly.

items.name: Information Security
items.description: Safeguarding data from unauthorized access, use, or damage.

items.name: Problem Management
items.description: Identifying root causes of incidents to prevent future issues.

tabs.description: We offer a wide range of solutions centered on IT Infrastructure and Security, designed to maximize impact and value to your business. Our solutions cover everything from network hardware and software to advanced security measures, bandwidth optimization, and communication systems.

items.description: Always-on concierge assistance ensuring perpetual operational continuity.

items.description: Full-spectrum oversight of your technological ecosystem, from cloud to local.

items.description: Rigorous analysis of legacy systems to identify optimization paths.

items.name: DR

items.name: GRC

tabs.description: We offer a wide range of services centered on IT Infrastructure and Security, designed to maximize impact and value to your business. Our services are aimed at optimizing IT, enabling and extending to further achieve your organizational objectives and success.

items.text: Juniper Networks delivers high-performance networking and cybersecurity solutions that AMI integrates to help clients build secure, AI-driven enterprise networks.
items.author: Juniper Networks

items.text: Barracuda provides cloud-enabled security solutions trusted by organizations worldwide. AMI deploys Barracuda's email protection, application security, and data protection for clients across Indonesia.
items.author: Barracuda Networks

items.text: Rapid7 empowers organizations to reduce risk across their entire connected environment. Through this partnership, AMI delivers advanced vulnerability management and incident detection capabilities.
items.author: Rapid7

news.title: News & Articles
news.subtitle: Stay updated with the latest in IT security and technology

items.title: IT Security Spending to Reach $96 Billion in 2018
items.excerpt: Gartner predicts that worldwide security spend will reach $96 billion dollars, up 8% from the previous year. The latest figures show substantial increases reflecting the growing importance of cybersecurity in modern enterprises.

items.title: The Real Reason You're Failing at PCI DSS Compliance
items.excerpt: IT organizations don't struggle with PCI DSS compliance due to a lack of knowledge or technology. The problem is proficiency. With years of data breach investigation reports, patterns start to become clear.

items.title: DDI is a Critical Component of IoT Success
items.excerpt: The Internet of Things era has arrived, and businesses need to be prepared for a world where everything is connected. There are currently 25 billion internet-connected devices, and that will double by 2025.

items.title: Fighting Automation with Automation
items.excerpt: Disruptions caused by autonomous malware could have devastating implications. As attackers leverage automation, defenders must also adopt automated threat detection and response capabilities to keep pace.
